name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-45
title: rabbit-project-consolidate.py never returns non-zero even on warnings (contract says exit 1=error)
description: scripts/rabbit-project-consolidate.py prints warnings via 'print(..., file=sys.stderr)' for unknown features and overlapping paths but never exits non-zero. contract.md declares this script with exit='0=ok 1=error'. Even on critical consistency errors (referenced feature missing, paths overlap) the script exits 0, so the parent rabbit-project.py 'consolidate' subcommand always reports success. Either downgrade the contract entry (drop the 1=error claim), or have the script exit 1 when any warning fires.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
